content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +0.90%, all sectoral indices green, Pharma (+2.78%) and Realty (+2.60%) leading. VIX collapsing to 18.52 (-6%) signals risk-on. Power and metal clusters extended near 52w highs. Book is already 60% deployed; priority is managing existing positions and trailing SLs rather than chasing more breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down 2.5% but PSU bank sector strong, MAHABANK leading sector today (+2.08%). Strong Q4 fundamentals (PAT +35%, GNPA improved). SL at 76.50 still ~3.8% away. Capital raise overhang noted but thesis intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.53,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op MODIFY avoided — current SL 1032.53 already locked above entry 984 (breakeven+5%) per trailing rule. Position +7.1%, original target 1110 still ~5.4% away. Holding with current SL — emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Marginally negative -0.5%. Gold consolidating; structural drivers (Fed cuts, RBI accumulation, Akshaya Tritiya) intact. SL at 119 still 4.4% away — adequate buffer. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up 0.7%, strong Q4 fundamentals (PAT +27%, revenue +23%, fresh 52w high). SL at 1418 is very tight — already near breakeven+. No need to tighten further as trail level not yet triggered (P&L < 2%). Target 1465 within reach."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Down 1.4%. Q4 results Apr 30 — binary event 3 days away. SL at 2295 ~1.9% below CMP. Holding into results given sector rotation tailwind from Nestle's strong print. Will re-evaluate post-results."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.5% with strong sector momentum (record 256 GW peak demand). Tightening SL from 405 to 406 — moves slightly above entry to breakeven+0.4% to lock gains. Trail rule: P&L approaching 2% threshold; small tighten to protect capital. Target 425 (~3.5% upside) intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down 1.6% after intraday spike to 1824 reversed sharply (closed 1778 — bearish intraday reversal from 52w high). Power cluster overheated. SL at 1760 ~1% below CMP — tight enough. Holding but watching for breakdown; if 1760 breaks, exit cleanly."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up 0.2% post Organon acquisition; intraday made 1766 high then faded. Acquisition is large but adds leverage and integration risk. SL at 1705 ~1.9% below CMP — sufficient. P&L too small to trail. Holding for follow-through into resistance 1830."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 318.00,
      "new_target": 335.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position marginally positive. Tightening SL from 316 to 318 — still below entry but reduces risk given price near 52w high (323) where reversal risk elevated. Sector tailwind strong (peak demand records, Kenya JV). Target 335 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 23.65 from earlier; CMP 23.79 has run above the limit. Per order hygiene, NOT stacking another order. Letting the existing limit work — if it doesn't fill by EOD, will reassess tomorrow. Pharma rally may already be priced in."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 612 still working. Not stacking a duplicate. Letting it work."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 443 still working. Not stacking. With NTPC, POWERGRID, TORNTPOWER already held, power cluster is heavily concentrated — even if this fills, next ticks should not add more power names. Considering CANCEL if it doesn't fill by EOD given cluster concentration."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SAIL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Breakout to 15-yr high zone, but HSBC target 150 (15% below CMP). With HINDZINC pending fill, metal exposure already coming. No add."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "VEDL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Demerger record date May 1 creates price-discovery volatility on May 2. With cum-demerger window only 2 days away, price already adjusted. Better to avoid binary event with concentrated metals exposure already coming via HINDZINC."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong turnaround narrative but book already 60% deployed and MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING already provide financial cluster exposure. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "JSWENERGY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Power cluster already overweight (NTPC, POWERGRID, TORNTPOWER + pending TATAPOWER). Adding 4th name at 52w high would breach cluster discipline. Hard pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "UTIAMC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 net loss of Rs 67 cr (first quarterly loss); fell 11% on results. 6.3x volume surge today is dead-cat bounce on oversold setup. Bearish research sentiment. Avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AXISBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 3.4% post weak Q4 (flat PAT, big provisions). Don't catch falling knives on results miss. Wait for stabilization."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 7.5% on realty sector momentum but extended; book full and not chasing breakouts. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "M&MFIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 8.9% on Q4 beat but volume only 0.6x — weak conviction breakout. Financial cluster already represented. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "IDFCFIRSTB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Decent Q4 but financial cluster already covered by MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING. No fresh add."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "PSU bank leader today, fundamentals strong, SL well below entry"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to 1032.53 (breakeven+5%) — locking gains. Target 1110 still has room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, structural drivers intact"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1418 already very tight near entry; let position breathe given strong fundamentals"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Holding into Apr 30 results; SL at 2295 already accommodates result-day vol"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL to breakeven+ to lock gains amid sector strength"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Bearish intraday reversal from 52w high noted but SL at 1760 only ~1% away — let it work; if hit, clean exit"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Acquisition catalyst playing out; let position develop"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 318.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten given price at 52w high resistance — reduce risk on potential reversal"
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "INDUSINDBK and M&MFIN remain interesting on financial turnaround themes — would re-engage after digesting current book. AXISBANK requires 1-2 sessions of stabilization above 1300 before entry consideration. VEDL post-May 2 (post-demerger ex-date) may offer cleaner setup. Consider CANCEL on TATAPOWER pending order tomorrow if cluster concentration remains a concern.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 60% deployed with ~9 positions; healthy diversification across PSU bank, financials, FMCG, gold, pharma, power. Power cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + TORNTPOWER + pending TATAPOWER) is the cluster to watch — if TATAPOWER fills, power exposure pushes toward concentration limit. Trailing SLs tightened on NTPC and POWERGRID to lock partial gains and protect against reversal at 52w-high resistance. Day P&L positive (+0.35%) but rolling win rate weak (11%) — disciplined position management is the priority over new entries today. No new BUYs given pending orders + deployment level."
}
